grant_title: Funding Available through the Walter Cerf Community Fund for Addison County, Brandon, and Organizations with Statewide Reach
geographic_restrictions: Addison County, Brandon, or statewide reach in Vermont
project_area: arts, education, historic preservation, and social services with priority for underserved populations
demographic_requirements: Priority given to work addressing needs of underserved populations
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofits and municipal organizations with either statewide reach or serving Addison County or Brandon. Approximately 70% of funds reserved for Addison County/Brandon programs; 30% for statewide programs with preference for those including Addison County/Brandon services. Small grants ($500-$5,000) for program/project or general operating support; large grants (up to $25,000) must be program/project specific and serve Addison County or Brandon.
